query:
CREATE TABLE `article_purchases` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`articleId` int NOT NULL,
	`amount` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL,
	`stripePaymentIntentId` varchar(255),
	`status` enum('pending','completed','refunded') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'completed',
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `article_purchases_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
)
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 44k1efRsdsVyDeY.root --database 8CrHDvBhNX8k2hxK9ZrGb8 --execute CREATE TABLE `article_purchases` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`articleId` int NOT NULL,
	`amount` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL,
	`stripePaymentIntentId` varchar(255),
	`status` enum('pending','completed','refunded') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'completed',
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `article_purchases_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
)
